The Event

Hong Kong's First Global Chess Championship

FIDE World Team Rapid & Blitz Championships 2026

This June, Hong Kong will host the FIDE World Team Rapid & Blitz Chess Championships — the first major global chess championship ever held in Hong Kong. The event brings together teams from around the world to compete for a €500,000 prize fund at Queen Elizabeth Stadium. Hong Kong joins Düsseldorf, Astana, and London as host cities of this prestigious championship — putting our city on the global chess map.

Magnus Carlsen
Norway — the highest-rated chess player in history and global chess icon
Ding Liren
China — the first-ever Chinese World Chess Champion, a household name across mainland China
€500,000
Total prize fund
6 Days
Of world-class competition
50+ Teams
From around the world

Why Chess?

Chess Is Bigger Than You Think

The world's oldest game is having its biggest moment.

600 Million
People play chess regularly worldwide — that's nearly 10% of the global population
Source: FIDE / YouGov
#1
The best-selling board game in history, played across 204 countries — more than the United Nations has member states
Source: FIDE (204 member federations)
10 Million
Concurrent viewers watched the 2024 World Chess Championship live — comparable to major sporting finals
Source: Chess.com / multiple outlets
62 Million
Netflix households watched The Queen's Gambit — chess became prime-time entertainment
Source: Netflix official data, 2020

Chess isn't niche. It's a global cultural phenomenon — and it's growing faster than ever.

Who We Are

Scholastic Chess Hong Kong — More Than a Chess Club

Founded in 2012, Scholastic Chess is one of Hong Kong's leading chess education providers — working with 250+ students across 20+ schools and our own academy. Our programme is built around a professionally designed curriculum by Dr. Pavel Martynov (PhD in Education, FIDE Master).

2012
Founded
20+
Schools
250+
Students
Principal
Oliver Conran
FIDE School Instructor & National Arbiter. Chess Promoter & Tournament Director. 10+ years of teaching experience.
Head Coach & Curriculum Author
Dr. Pavel Martynov
PhD in Education (chess pedagogy). FIDE Master. 10+ years of professional coaching. Popular chess educator on YouTube.

A decade of chess education in Hong Kong.

FIDE World Team Rapid & Blitz Chess Championships 2026scholasticchesshk.com
Our Team. Our Mission.

We're Sending Hong Kong to the World Stage

6 players. One mission. Represent Hong Kong.

The FIDE World Team Rapid & Blitz Championship has a unique format: each team of 6 must include at least one female player and one recreational player. This means world-class grandmasters and young club players compete side by side.

♚
2 Grandmasters
We are inviting world-class grandmasters to strengthen our competitiveness and increase the team's visibility and media reach.
♝
1 FIDE Master
Our Head Coach, Dr. Pavel Martynov, will serve as team captain and player — bringing professional-level play and leadership.
♟
2 Local HK Talents
A once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for the most talented young students of our academy to play against the best in the world.
♛
1 Female Player
We are committed to diversity in chess and proud to give a platform to local female talent.

This isn't just a chess team. It's a story — Hong Kong's next generation, competing on their home turf, against the best in the world. Your brand can be the name behind that story.

Why Sponsor Us

Three Reasons to Get Involved

01
Community Impact
You're sending Hong Kong children to compete on the world stage — in their home city, for the first time. This is a story parents, schools, and media will care about. Your brand is the name behind it.
02
Brand Visibility in the Right Context
Chess audiences are young, educated, and affluent. Your brand will be visible on jerseys, in social media content, in video, and in press coverage — all within a sport associated with intelligence and sophistication.
03
Limited Availability
The championship is June 16–22 — less than 12 weeks away. There is only one sponsorship slot available, and it cannot be shared. Early commitment secures your place as the team's sole partner.

The right event. The right audience. The right price.
